positive: A minimalist, abstract geometric design featuring interconnected crystalline structures and flowing organic lines, rendered in high-contrast black and deep indigo against an off-white background. The composition is central and symmetrical, creating a striking silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Utilize a blend of Art Nouveau and modern geometric abstraction styles. Use clean, precise line work, metallic ink effects, and perfect flatness. Intricate details, crisp edges, vector-art quality, studio lighting, high resolution, perfect symmetry.
